freeCancel: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in
soldOutMsg: No availability for the selected dates. Try other dates or reach us on WhatsApp.
extrasIntro: Personalize your stay. All additional services are confirmed upon booking.
guestIntro: Your information is only used for confirmation and communication purposes.
privacyAgreement: I accept the cancellation policies and the privacy policy
escnnaNotice: In compliance with Colombian Law 679 of 2001, we warn that child sexual exploitation and abuse are criminally and administratively punished.
paymentIntro: Choose how you would like to pay.
paymentHotelInfo: Your reservation is confirmed without prior charge. You pay upon check-in. Free cancellation up to 24 hours prior.
paymentTransferInfo: You will receive bank details by email. You have 24 hours to complete the transfer and confirm your booking.
paymentWompiInfo: Pay securely with credit card, PSE, or Nequi through Wompi. Your booking will be confirmed when the payment is approved.
paymentMercadoPagoInfo: Pay securely by card, PSE, or other methods available in Mercado Pago. Your booking will be confirmed when the payment is approved.
paymentErrorDeclined: The transaction was declined by the payment gateway. Please try again with another card or payment method.
paymentErrorFailed: An error occurred while processing the payment. Please try again.
emptySummary: Choose your apartaestudio to view the summary here.
howToGetDesc: Carrera 23 #62-70, Manizales. Covered parking available on site.
checkInOutDesc: Check-in from 3:00 pm. Check-out before 12:00 pm.
manageIntro: Check, modify or cancel your booking. You only need your booking reference and email.
resCancelPolicy: Cancellation by rate: Flexible — free up to 48 h before check-in · Best Price — non-refundable.
resCancelConfirmDesc: We will send your cancellation request to our team. It is processed according to your rate's policy; you will receive the confirmation and refund details by email.
resCancelSendError: We could not send your request. Please try again or contact us on WhatsApp.
resCancelRequestedDesc: We received your request. Our team will process it according to your rate's policy and confirm by email within 24 hours.
resCancelError: We could not find any booking with that reference and email. Please check the details or contact us on WhatsApp.

roomDescs.clasica: Double bed, equipped kitchen and private bathroom in 29 sqm. Cozy and functional.
roomDescs.seleccion: 36 sqm with city view. Three beds for up to 5 guests — king, double and single.
roomDescs.reserva: 24 sqm with city view. Double bed, equipped kitchen and private bathroom.
roomDescs.origen: 29 sqm with city view. Double bed plus a single bed — up to 3 guests.
roomDescs.especial: 27 sqm with city view. Double bed, full kitchen and all amenities.

extrasDescs.desayuno: Coffee, fresh fruit, and eggs served every morning
extrasDescs.parqueadero: Covered parking garage in the building
extrasDescs.late: Late check-out until 3:00 pm (subject to availability)
extrasDescs.early: Early check-in from 10:00 am (subject to availability)
extrasDescs.traslado: To or from La Nubia Airport
extrasDescs.tour: 4 hours with a certified local guide

paymentDescs.mercadopago: Credit card, debit card, PSE, and other methods
paymentDescs.hotel: Book now without prepay, pay upon check-in
paymentDescs.transfer: We will email you our bank details

sandboxBannerBody: This build is using sandbox payment credentials. No transaction will charge real money. Use Wompi or Mercado Pago test cards.
